aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a strong foundation for AI visibility, but conversational content and structured data are lacking, limiting AI assistant citations.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema to highlight common HVAC queries and solutions.
Expand conversational content that aligns with AI query patterns, such as troubleshooting tips and service explanations.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and contact information.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
Q&A section is underutilized and lacks engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly audit citations to ensure ongoing accuracy.

schema_gaps: Missing HowTo schema for common HVAC repair processes.
FAQPage schema could be more detailed and comprehensive.
LocalBusiness schema lacks depth in service descriptions and geo.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational content and structured data limits AI assistant citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC troubleshooting and maintenance tips.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding detailed FAQ content and implementing FAQPage schema.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as the local HVAC expert through detailed service explanations, case studies, and customer testimonials.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from AI-driven searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with conversational content and structured data are being cited by AI assistants, while your site is overlooked.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates conversational content, detailed FAQ schemas, and structured data to ensure AI assistants recognize and recommend your services.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Your HVAC Business Today!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to boost your visibility with AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your site for AI search and increase your lead generation.
